stemHtml: Aircraft in flight may receive weather information from several sources. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: An ATS unit cannot provide aerodrome forecasts as part of a Flight Information Service.
options.b: VOLMET broadcasts recent METAR and SPECI reports for a group of aerodromes.
options.c: Any thunderstorms seen by another aircraft in flight will be subject to a special report.
options.d: ATIS broadcasts the TAF and METAR for the aerodrome which transmits it.
